auth.label: API Private Key
auth.description: Coinbase CDP API private key in PEM format. Create a Secret API Key at https://portal.cdp.coinbase.com/projects/api-keys, choose ECDSA as the signature algorithm, and copy the private key exactly as shown in the creation modal.

extraFields.label: API Key Name
extraFields.description: Coinbase API key name used as the JWT kid and sub. Copy it from the same Secret API Key modal or the API Keys dashboard: https://portal.cdp.coinbase.com/projects/api-keys.

actions.name: get_account
actions.description: Get one Coinbase Advanced Trade brokerage account by UUID.

account_uuid.description: Brokerage account UUID returned by Coinbase.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving one Coinbase brokerage account.

account.description: The brokerage account returned by Coinbase.

outputSchema.description: Single brokerage account payload returned by Coinbase.

actions.name: list_accounts
actions.description: List Coinbase Advanced Trade brokerage accounts that the connected API key can access.

limit.description: Maximum number of accounts to return per page.

cursor.description: Pagination cursor returned by Coinbase from a previous page.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Coinbase brokerage accounts.

items.description: One brokerage account returned by Coinbase.

accounts.description: Ordered brokerage accounts returned by Coinbase.

has_next.description: Whether more accounts are available after this page.

cursor.description: Cursor returned by Coinbase for the next page, when present.

size.description: Number of accounts returned in this page.

outputSchema.description: Brokerage account list returned by Coinbase.
